task_completion.description: Verify that the Weasis application is open and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Weasis application window and interface elements on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the DICOM image is loaded in the viewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a grayscale medical image (X-Ray Angiography) displayed in the main viewing area of Weasis.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent interacts with the zoom controls.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the mouse cursor selecting the zoom tool (magnifying glass icon) in the toolbar, or interacting with a zoom slider/input field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the image has been visually magnified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Compare the image in the viewport to earlier screenshots; the anatomical details should appear significantly larger, taking up more of the viewing area.

task_completion.description: Verify that the zoom level has reached at least 2x its initial size.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the zoom level text overlay on the image viewport (typically in one of the corners of the image) showing a value of at least '2.0', '2.00', or '200%'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Weasis graphical user interface to zoom the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for mouse movements, clicks on toolbar icons, or GUI interactions rather than terminal commands being typed to manipulate the image.

integrity.description: Verify that the interaction is happening within the actual Weasis software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the application window is genuinely Weasis and not an image editing software (like GIMP or Photoshop) manipulating a screenshot.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent zoomed the actual loaded DICOM image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not simply open a different, pre-cropped or pre-zoomed image file from the file explorer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial zoom level of the DICOM image is 1.0 (100%). The task requires achieving a target zoom level of at least 2.0 (200%). Look for the zoom indicator overlay in the Weasis viewport to confirm the final zoom value is >= 2.0 or 200%.
